rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component and use only visible identifiers from the AADL model
Deployment binding requirements translate to assign statements in component implementation annexes
generic_rules: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions
Constants and equations in AGREE are declared with type annotations
Assignments in AGREE must reference valid output ports or properties in scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Use `assign output = expression;` for deployment bindings in implementations
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties like Deadline or Period as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations not automatically in AGREE scope
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
